consistency.rarity_field: Source rarity 'Weapon (arrow), very rare' is consistent with type 'Weapon (arrow)' and rarity 'Very Rare'.

quality.completeness: Data is complete, containing all necessary fields (name, type, rarity, description, attunement).
quality.clarity: The description clearly outlines the mechanics, specific trigger (damage to a particular creature type/race/group), save DC (17 Constitution), damage bonus (6d10 piercing), save effect (half damage), and one-time use nature.
quality.flavor: The description effectively conveys the specialized nature of the weapon.

mechanics.core_effect: Deals extra 6d10 piercing damage to a specific type/race/group of creature upon hitting it.
mechanics.limitations: The arrow becomes nonmagical after dealing its extra damage once.
